---
title: "Northampton Bike Stress Map"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
execute:
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
  echo: false
---

```{r}
source("ExploreStress.R", echo=FALSE)

library(leaflet.extras)
```

This map shows Level of Traffic Stress (LTS) for bicycling, Potential for Everyday Biking, actual bike routes used by recreational cyclists, and 5, 12, and 20-minute isochrones from downtown Northampton and Florence.

```{r}
map |> 
  addFullscreenControl()
```

Map data: OpenStreetMap, MassGIS, Ride with GPS \| Analysis & mapping: Kent S Johnson

[Level of Traffic Stress](https://peterfurth.sites.northeastern.edu/2014/05/21/criteria-for-level-of-traffic-stress/)

[Potential for Everyday Biking](https://geo-massdot.opendata.arcgis.com/datasets/MassDOT::potential-for-everyday-biking-2022-update-2/about)
